title: Upcoming Appointment by Preferred Method
summary: Sends reminder emails tailored to meeting format and language preference.
businessOutcome: Improve attendance by matching reminder content to how and where the consultation will happen.
thumbnail: Reminder emails match channel, method, and language.
problem: Generic appointment reminders cause confusion when clients have different meeting formats or language preferences.
solution: The workflow branches by consultation type and preferred language, then sends the appropriate reminder copy automatically.
